section_name: Intersection of Rail Line and Road or Street
text: Sections 112.051 (Entry onto Private Property) , 112.053 (Condemnation of Property: When Railroad Company and Owner Disagree) , 112.054 (Condemnation of Property: Certain Terminal Switching Railroads) , 112.055 (Right-of-way Acquired by Condemnation) , 112.057 (Construction on or near Certain Waterways or Roads) , 112.059 (Crossings of Public Roads) , and 112.061 (Suit Involving Railroad Company Property) do not affect a law that requires a railroad company to provide a proper crossing at each intersection of a road or street.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 112. Powers & Duties of Railroads
##### § 112.058 — Intersection of Rail Line and Road or Street

Sections 112.051 (Entry onto Private Property) , 112.053 (Condemnation of Property: When Railroad Company and Owner Disagree) , 112.054 (Condemnation of Property: Certain Terminal Switching Railroads) , 112.055 (Right-of-way Acquired by Condemnation) , 112.057 (Construction on or near Certain Waterways or Roads) , 112.059 (Crossings of Public Roads) , and 112.061 (Suit Involving Railroad Company Property) do not affect a law that requires a railroad company to provide a proper crossing at each intersection of a road or street.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.03, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: Sections 112.051 (Entry onto Private Property) , 112.053 (Condemnation of Property: When Railroad Company and Owner Disagree) , 112.054 (Condemnation of Property: Certain Terminal Switching Railroads) , 112.055 (Right-of-way Acquired by Condemnation) , 112.057 (Construction on or near Certain Waterways or Roads) , 112.059 (Crossings of Public Roads) , and 112.061 (Suit Involving Railroad Company Property) do not affect a law that requires a railroad company to provide a proper crossing at each intersection of a road or street.
